pred_reason: SWC-101 is applicable due to identified integer overflow/underflow risks in _transfer and totalSupply functions. SWC-107 applies because multiple findings confirm reentrancy vulnerabilities in external calls and transfer patterns. Evidence: Critical underflow vulnerability in _transfer function (Finding 4); Overflow risk in totalSupply calculations (Finding 5); Multiple reentrancy issues in external calls and transfer functions (Findings 1-3)
